description: Deploy 5-worker translation pipeline to RunPod Serverless: Whisper (pre-built), Diarization, Demucs, vLLM (pre-built), Chatterbox

whisper.name: yt-whisper
whisper.notes: Deploy from RunPod Hub - search 'Faster Whisper'

userStories.title: Create Diarization Worker
userStories.description: Create Pyannote speaker diarization worker with slim Dockerfile.
userStories.notes: Created runpod/diarization/ with handler, Dockerfile, requirements. Template and endpoint created via MCP.

userStories.title: Create Demucs Worker
userStories.description: Create Demucs audio separation worker with slim Dockerfile.
acceptanceCriteria: handler.py created with Demucs htdemucs model
userStories.notes: Created runpod/demucs/ with handler, Dockerfile, requirements. Template and endpoint created via MCP.

userStories.title: Create Chatterbox Worker
userStories.description: Verify/update Chatterbox TTS worker with slim Dockerfile.
userStories.notes: Existing runpod/chatterbox/ was already slim. Template and endpoint created via MCP.

userStories.title: Setup GitHub Actions for Image Builds
userStories.description: Create GitHub Actions workflow to build and push Docker images to GHCR.
userStories.notes: Workflow created and pushed. Check https://github.com/fjsikora/yt-translate/actions for build status.

userStories.title: Deploy Faster-Whisper Pre-built
userStories.description: Deploy official RunPod Faster-Whisper endpoint from Hub.
userStories.notes: MANUAL STEP: Go to RunPod Console → Serverless → Explore → Search 'Faster Whisper' → Deploy

userStories.title: Test Diarization Endpoint
userStories.description: Verify the diarization endpoint returns speaker segments.
acceptanceCriteria: Submit test job with audio URL
Response includes speaker segments with timestamps
userStories.notes: BLOCKED: Waiting for GitHub Actions to build images

userStories.title: Test Demucs Endpoint
userStories.description: Verify the Demucs endpoint separates vocals and background.
acceptanceCriteria: Submit test job with audio URL
Audio files are valid WAV format
userStories.notes: BLOCKED: Waiting for GitHub Actions to build images

userStories.title: Test vLLM Endpoint
userStories.description: Verify the vLLM endpoint translates text correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: API follows OpenAI chat completion format
userStories.notes: Endpoint exists and template is working. Need to test translation.

userStories.title: Test Chatterbox Endpoint
userStories.description: Verify the Chatterbox endpoint generates speech.
acceptanceCriteria: Submit test job with text + voice sample
userStories.notes: BLOCKED: Waiting for GitHub Actions to build images

userStories.title: Update Orchestrator
acceptanceCriteria: Whisper + Diarization + Demucs run in parallel
Results combined for translation and TTS
